notes: Focused subset authored from Mailchimp's official Marketing API v3 Swagger 2.0 machine spec (~10MB, 181 paths) plus the developer docs. Covers only the endpoints the adaptor calls via @mailchimp/mailchimp_marketing: getAllLists (listAudiences), getList (listAudienceInfo), getListMembersInfo (listMembers), addListMember (addMember), getListMember, updateListMember (updateMember), deleteListMember (archiveMember), deleteListMemberPermanent (deleteMember), get/updateListMemberTags (updateMemberTags), batchListMembers POST /lists/{id} (upsertMembers), batchSegmentMembers POST /lists/{id}/segments/{sid} (tagMembers), startBatch and listBatches (POST/GET /batches). Response schemas were derived from the official spec and reduced to the load-bearing fields; large sub-objects (campaign_defaults, modules, marketing_permissions, detailed stats) are simplified. The generic request/get/post adaptor helpers can hit any /3.0 path and are not enumerated. Origin is generated (hand-authored subset), not verbatim, and converted from Swagger 2.0 shapes to OpenAPI 3.0.3.
